title: Raccoon Removal in Hicksville, NY | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Hicksville, Long Island. Licensed experts safely remove raccoons from attics, chimneys & crawl spaces. Call for fast service: $900–$4,000.
intro: Hicksville homeowners face frequent raccoon intrusions, especially in attic spaces and around garbage areas in this densely populated Long Island community. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon removal services throughout Hicksville, addressing everything from attic infestations to chimney invasions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of raccoon control in suburban Nassau County neighborhoods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife removal experience to Hicksville, with same-day emergency response available throughout Long Island. Our technicians are fully licensed, insured, and trained in humane removal techniques that comply with all New York State wildlife regulations.
localContext: Hicksville's mix of mid-century ranch homes, split-levels, and newer developments near the Broadway Mall area creates ideal entry points for raccoons seeking shelter. Properties near Cantiague Park and the wooded areas along the LIRR corridor are particularly susceptible to raccoon activity, especially during spring birthing season.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Hicksville typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, and necessary repairs. A basic single raccoon extraction starts around $900, while complete attic remediation with multiple animals and extensive damage repair can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: What are signs of raccoons in my Hicksville attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include heavy thumping or walking sounds at night, especially between dusk and dawn, strong musky odors, visible damage to roof vents or soffits, scattered insulation, droppings in the attic, and tipped garbage cans. Hicksville homeowners often first notice raccoons when they hear chirping sounds from baby raccoons in spring months from March through June.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Hicksville humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, live-trapping methods that comply with New York State Department of Environmental Conservation regulations. We never use poisons or harmful techniques. Raccoons are safely trapped and relocated according to state guidelines, and we take extra care during baby season to ensure mothers and offspring are kept together during removal.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Hicksville home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Hicksville and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal timeline depends on the situation—a single raccoon may be trapped within 1-3 days, while a family of raccoons may take 5-10 days to ensure all animals are safely removed. We provide exclusion services immediately to prevent re-entry.
